context: Recent composite feed (Aave-on-Mantle TVL, USD 8-dec): 14050000000000000, 14120000000000000, 13980000000000000, 14200000000000000, 14160000000000000. Hovering around $141M with ~$2M daily noise. No incentive-program changes; MNT price flat over 24h.
reasoning: Observed: TVL is range-bound near 1.416e16 (~$141.6M), oscillating within ±$2M and no net drift over five snapshots. Hypothesis: with stable MNT price and no incentive catalyst, TVL stays near its recent mean; supply/withdraw flows roughly net out day to day. I center on the recent average (~$141M) and set the band to cover the observed ±$2M noise plus a little headroom, landing at roughly $138.5M–$143.5M. Bands narrower than the observed noise would be overconfident. Confidence ~72%: calm regime, but a single whale deposit or withdrawal can move TVL a few million in a day.
